meaning: adj.最后的,临终的,末尾的,最近的,结论性的vi.持续,支持,维持vt.使维持,楦adv.最后,后来n.最后,末尾,临终,鞋楦头
examples: At last they were agreeing, at last they were getting somewhere.
Mr. TAYLOR: (Singing) There were times that I thought that I wouldn't last too long.
For much of the last decade Buick offered four different four-door, front-wheel-drive sedans with V6 engines.
